description:
Pokémon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire combines traditional fast pinball gameplay with a Pokémon twist! Catch over 200
Pokémon across two separate boards and aim for a high score!

pbrs_0.0.1.title: Pokémon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire APWorld v0.0.1

pbrs_0.0.2.description:
# Bug Fixes
* Fix Pichu not being implemented in the client
* Fix Sapphire Ocean and Wilderness being swapped
* Fix being unable to activate the Special Guests card.
pbrs_0.0.2.title: Pokémon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire APWorld v0.0.2

pbrs_0.1.0.description:
# New Features
* DexNav
  * Spend 30+ coins to guarantee a specific Pokémon that can be found in a location
* Single Board Option
  * Reduces the game to only your starting board, removing 
* Evo Mode Option
  * Evo Mode can now be 3 arrows in the pool, 1 singular item in the pool, or started with. These apply alongside evolution items.
* Difficulty Option
  * When set, certain "soft" logic requirements are relaxed
* Collect Pokédex Option
  * When enabled, Pokédex locations will be affected by collect. This can allow goaling from collects if all goals are Pokédex-related.
* Same Slot Co-op
  * Pokédex catches are saved to data storage and will sync across concurrent players on the same slot
* RingLink
  * Send and receive coins from other players playing RingLink-compatible games such as SMW or SA2B
* New Items
  * Evolution Items
    * Evolution is now locked by individual items based on the Pokémon's evolution method
  * Helper Pokémon
    * Makuhita, Whiscash, Zigzagoon, and Pelipper have all been added to the item pool
  * Coin Arrows
    * Coin arrows are now added to the item pool.
  * Double Coin Modifier
    * Doubles coins received from coin arrows.

# Bug Fixes
* Fixed Latios and Latias logically being considered for the opposite board
* Fixed score goaling being just, completely broken
* Fixed score items resetting current score in certain cases
* Fixed an issue where one could travel to Ruins via normal travel on the Ruby Board
* Fixed Ruins Area Card giving access to the Ruins before it is unlocked
* Fixed Ruins Area Card giving access to Forest and Volcano/Lake before they are unlocked
* Fixed an issue where most egg Pokémon would be uncatchable on the Ruby Board
* Fixed an edge case where having the opposite board's egg bunch would guarantee Pichu to hatch
* Fixed an issue where Clamperl would not consider its evolutions in its spawn rate until you have 3 starting balls

# Other Changes
* Changed evolutions to only require BasicPinball
* Rayquaza bonus stage/capture can be considered logical early with Ruins Area Card
* Rare encounters can now be considered in logic if Rayquaza capture is in logic
* Client commands now check for equality using title casing
pbrs_0.1.0.title: Pokémon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire APWorld v0.1.0

pbrs_0.2.0.description:
# New Features
* New Goal Option: Medals
  * When enabled, Pokédex Medals are added to the item pool, and receiving a certain amount of them is required for goal
* Goal Trigger
  * Choose when goal should be checked, either at end of ball or after defeating Groudon/Kyogre/Rayquaza
* `/check_goal` Quickly check goal progress
* A message will now appear in-game when items are received from other players.
* A message will now appear in-game when goal is completed.
* Egg Bunches 1-4 have been replaced with the following:
  * Egg Bunch (Forest): Wurmple, Ralts, Oddish
  * Egg Bunch (Cave): Whismur, Aron, Zubat, Bagon
  * Egg Bunch (Mountain): Spoink, Shuppet, Chimecho, Natu
  * Egg Bunch (Desert): Sandshrew, Spinda, Trapinch, Phanpy
  * Egg Bunch (Sea): Snorunt, Spheal, Corsola, Horsea

# Bug Fixes
* Pichu can now be DexNav'd with less than 100 Pokémon registered.
* Fixed Special Guest dex entries being offset by 1
* Fixed attract mode incrementing counters for ball upgrades/bumpers
* Fixed being able to activate e-Reader cards without actually owning the e-Reader cards
* Fixed Clamperl requiring a Fire Stone for evolution, rather than a Link Cable
pbrs_0.2.0.title: Pokémon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire APWorld v0.2.0
